<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Support; use Illuminate\Contracts\Support\Arrayable; use ReflectionClass; use ReflectionProperty; /** @implements Arrayable<string, mixed> */ class Data implements Arrayable { public function toArray(): array { $array = []; $reflectionClass = new ReflectionClass($this); foreach ($reflectionClass->getProperties(ReflectionProperty::IS_PUBLIC) as $property) { $name = $property->getName(); $value = $this->$name; if ($value instanceof Arrayable) { $array[$name] = $value->toArray(); } else { $array[$name] = $value; } } return $array; } }
